title: cost_constants
description: Phase 4 cost constants. Per-model input/output token prices used by `cost.estimator` to print an estimate before a `baseline-opus --all` run. The values in `data/cost_constants.json` are PLACEHOLDERS — they reflect a snapshot of public Anthropic API pricing at the time this PR was opened, and operators MUST verify them against current docs before treating an --all confirmation as accurate. All numeric values are non-negative; the currency is restricted to USD for the Phase 4 surface.
